ocr_findings.trace: Recurring 'ココ'→'はつし' misread on stylized callout banner. Same defect on p305. Banner is dropped by downstream cleaning, no entity impact.
ocr_findings.recommended_fix: Stage 2/3 regex fixup '試験にはつしが出る' → '試験にココが出る'.

ocr_findings.jp_expected: (bullet icon) IaaS  /  イアース (reading guide)
ocr_findings.trace: Bullet glyph rendered as '0.00'; capital 'I' rendered as lowercase 'l' (laaS instead of IaaS); furigana 'イアース' misread as 'ライアース'. Stage 4 correctly normalized to 'IaaS' in structured/translated/output, so no downstream impact.
ocr_findings.recommended_fix: Stage 2 normalization: bullet icons → strip; 'laaS'→'IaaS'. Already handled de facto by structurer.

translation_findings.jp: 他社の敷地内にある、他社が所有しているサーバを利用するサービスである（契約しているサーバの所在が不明確）
translation_findings.zh: 使用位于其他公司场地内、由其他公司所拥有的服务器的服务（所签约服务器的所在地不明确）
translation_findings.en: A service that uses servers located in and owned by another company (the location of the contracted server is unclear)
translation_findings.issue: RELEASE-IMPACTING SOURCE DEFECT: The JP definition for ホスティングサービス says '所在が不明確' (location unclear), but the OCR (line 5) and book content say '所在が明確' (location IS clear). Stage 4 structurer flipped 明確→不明確, likely contaminated by the adjacent クラウドコンピューティング definition which legitimately is '不明確'. zh and en translations faithfully reflect the wrong JP — so all three language surfaces ship a factually incorrect distinction (hosting vs cloud). This collapses the very contrast the page is teaching: hosting=clear-location, cloud=unclear-location.
translation_findings.recommended_fix: Correct JP definition to '...サービスである（契約しているサーバの所在が明確）'. Re-translate zh: '...的服务（所签约服务器的所在地明确）'. Re-translate en: '...(the location of the contracted server is clear)'. Apply to structured/translated/output/glossary.
